name: roku-graphify
description: BrightScript code graph analysis tool powered by brighterscript

scripts.build-grammar: cd packages/graphify && npx tree-sitter generate && npx node-gyp configure && npx node-gyp build
scripts.test: node --check src/cli/cli.analyze-file.mjs && node --check src/cli/cli.analyze-app.mjs && node --check src/cli/cli.generate-sdk-exports.mjs && echo 'All checks passed'
